puzzle0.title: BREACH CONTAINMENT ROUTING
puzzle0.description: Match each emergency system with the correct containment function.

puzzle1.title: BREACH ORIGIN CORRELATION
puzzle1.description: Match each recovered breach record with the correct conclusion.

event0.text: You chose to follow my memories.

event1.text: Then I need to be honest. I don't know which parts are mine anymore.
Good. Suspicion keeps people alive longer than loyalty.
Pressure alarms. People screaming. Sector 7.

event0.text: There was heat first. Then the air moved the wrong way.

event1.text: People don't scream like that unless they already know help is too late.

event0.text: Sector 7 was supposed to be sealed storage.

event1.text: Which is station language for: nobody asks what is inside unless something explodes.
Noah shouldn't remember that.
He doesn't remember what happened. Let him keep it that way.
I would rather break on the truth than stay intact inside a lie.
Sometimes mercy looks like silence. People hate hearing that until silence is all that keeps them standing.
[PRESSURE LOSS IN PROGRESS]
Fast. Dangerous. Naturally, that is the option with our fingerprints on it.
No. Drones patch the hull. Valves reduce pressure loss. Sector seal isolates Sector 7. Try again before we become station decoration.
[NOTIFICATION QUEUED: EMERGENCY REPAIR COMPLETE]

event0.title: BREACH REPORT
event0.content:
SECTOR: 7
HULL DAMAGE: CONFIRMED
PRESSURE LOSS: CONTAINED
CAUSE: INTERNAL EXPLOSION
ORIGIN: STORAGE SUBLEVEL / RESTRICTED ACCESS
VISUAL FEED: UNAVAILABLE
event0.caption: Recovered breach report from Sector 7 emergency archive.

event0.title: EXPLOSIVE TRACE REPORT
event0.content:
TRACE TYPE: INTERNAL DETONATION
EXTERNAL IMPACT: NOT DETECTED
DEVICE SIGNATURE: CONTROLLED PRESSURE CHARGE
ACCESS REQUIREMENT: CREW-LEVEL AUTHORIZATION
NOTE: detonation pattern suggests deliberate placement.
event0.caption: Recovered explosive trace report from Sector 7 hull residue.
event0.message: [EXPLOSIVE TRACE REPORT ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event0.text: Because someone wanted Alpha to look like an accident.

event1.text: And because every time this station says 'accident', I now hear 'cover-up' wearing a lab coat.
That report was buried. Nobody was supposed to find it.
No. If this wasn't an accident, then someone made sure I remembered it wrong.

event0.text: Then someone killed them and called it physics.
Stable is not exactly my strongest feature right now.

event1.text: But fine. Records first. Panic after.

event0.title: ORIGINAL CREW MANIFEST
event0.content:
ORIGINAL CREW COUNT: 7

01 ETHAN HALE
02 MAYA CHEN
03 GRANT WALKER
04 RIVERA TORRES
05 OWEN PARK
06 SARAH OWENS
07 [IDENTITY PARTIALLY ERASED]

NOTE: Later manifest versions reduced crew count.
event0.caption: Recovered original crew manifest. Seventh crew identity partially erased.
event0.message: [ORIGINAL CREW MANIFEST ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event1.text: [BREACH ORIGIN CORRELATION REQUIRED]
No. Breach report points to Sector 7. Trace says internal detonation. Manifest says seven crew. Put the ugly pieces together.
Because it wasn't me. And it wasn't Hale.
